label: Ultrasonic → Bluetooth
info:
Monitors WAV files and sends classification results via Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE).

Requires: node-red-contrib-generic-ble
Install: npm install node-red-contrib-generic-ble

name: BLE Payload (abnormal)
BLE Payload (normal)
→ Connect BLE node here
Bluetooth (BLE) Output — Ultrasonic UV Panel Monitor
info:
Sends compact JSON over Bluetooth Low Energy.

BLE has a small MTU, so the image is NOT sent over BLE.
Instead, only a compact status message is transmitted:
  ABN: abnormal (class + confidence %)
  OK:  normal (confidence %)

The full spectrogram PNG is saved to disk (see Event dir config).

Requires: node-red-contrib-generic-ble
  npm install node-red-contrib-generic-ble
